text:
Created attachment 255404
Patch including applicalbe to other affected ports

For convenience, additionally updated "monolithic" patch for all affected ports.

I can file per-port Bugs if requested, but this would be convenient to apply for all (I hope) affected ports at once and check what happenes for bulk rebuilds.
Currently not bumped PORTREVISION.
